description: Create the NeuroX/ folder structure by copying all source files from python_bridge/, python_bridge_v2/, python_bridge_v3/ into NeuroX/neurox/, NeuroX/neurox_v2/, NeuroX/neurox_v3/ respectively. Copy the 3 EA files as NeuroX_EA.mq5, NeuroX_EA_v2.mq5, NeuroX_EA_v3.mq5. Copy the bat files as neurox_run.bat, neurox_run_v2.bat, neurox_run_v3.bat, neurox_setup.bat. Exclude __pycache__/ and .pytest_cache/ directories. Then rebrand all internal references.
steps: Create NeuroX/ directory at repo root
Copy python_bridge/ to NeuroX/neurox/ excluding __pycache__ and .pytest_cache and .pyc files
Copy python_bridge_v2/ to NeuroX/neurox_v2/ excluding __pycache__ and .pytest_cache and .pyc files
Copy python_bridge_v3/ to NeuroX/neurox_v3/ excluding __pycache__ and .pytest_cache and .pyc files
Create NeuroX/neurox_run.bat from update_and_run.bat with rebranded URLs and paths
Create NeuroX/neurox_run_v2.bat from update_and_run_v2.bat with rebranded paths
Create NeuroX/neurox_run_v3.bat from update_and_run_v3.bat with rebranded URLs and paths
Create NeuroX/neurox_setup.bat from setup_new_pc.bat with rebranded folder names and URLs

In all bat files: change GitHub URLs from .../python_bridge/... to .../NeuroX/neurox/..., python_bridge_v3/ to NeuroX/neurox_v3/, update_and_run.bat to NeuroX/neurox_run.bat, Python_Bridge_EA.mq5 to NeuroX/NeuroX_EA.mq5, etc.
In all bat files: change 'cd python_bridge' to 'cd neurox', 'cd python_bridge_v2' to 'cd neurox_v2', 'cd python_bridge_v3' to 'cd neurox_v3'
In all bat files: change local file paths like 'python_bridge/strategies/...' to 'neurox/strategies/...'
In bat files: change display text references where appropriate (e.g. folder structure echo statements)

In EA .mq5 files: update the header comment filename (e.g. Python_Bridge_EA_v3.mq5 -> NeuroX_EA_v3.mq5). DO NOT change any CSV filenames (InpSignalFile, InpConfirmFile, etc.) - those are bridge protocol.

In Python files (train_colab.py, training/auto_retrain.py): update comments/documentation references from python_bridge to neurox (e.g. '%cd Claude/python_bridge' becomes '%cd Claude/NeuroX/neurox', 'Copy this folder to your PC: python_bridge/checkpoints/' becomes 'Copy this folder to your PC: neurox/checkpoints/')
In Python files (training/auto_retrain.py): update the 'from python_bridge.train import train_all' to 'from neurox.train import train_all' in all 3 versions

DO NOT rename any CSV filenames in settings.py, bridge.py, or EA files - these are bridge protocol files (python_bridge_signal.csv, python_bridge_confirm.csv, python_bridge_heartbeat.txt, python_bridge_brain_settings.csv, python_bridge_v3_signal.csv, python_bridge_v3_confirm.csv, python_bridge_v3_tick_data.csv, python_bridge_v3_spread.csv, python_bridge_v3_heartbeat.txt, python_bridge_v3_exit.csv, python_bridge_v3_status.txt, python_bridge_exit.csv, python_bridge_status.txt, python_bridge_positions.csv, python_bridge_signal_multi.csv, python_bridge_confirm_multi.csv, python_bridge_exit_multi.csv, python_bridge_status_multi.txt, python_bridge_heartbeat_multi.txt)
acceptance_criteria: NeuroX/ folder exists with neurox/, neurox_v2/, neurox_v3/, 3 EA files, 4 bat files
No __pycache__ or .pyc files in the NeuroX/ tree
neurox_run.bat downloads from URLs pointing to NeuroX/neurox/ on GitHub and does 'cd neurox'
neurox_run_v3.bat downloads from URLs pointing to NeuroX/neurox_v3/ on GitHub, copies neurox/ to neurox_v3/, and does 'cd neurox_v3'
neurox_run_v2.bat references 'cd neurox_v2' instead of 'cd python_bridge_v2'
neurox_setup.bat creates neurox/ folders (not python_bridge/) and downloads from NeuroX/ URLs
All CSV filenames in settings.py, bridge.py, main_multi.py, and EA files remain unchanged (python_bridge_*.csv)
EA header comments show NeuroX_EA*.mq5 filename
train_colab.py and auto_retrain.py references updated from python_bridge to neurox
No trading logic is modified anywhere
verification: Run: grep -r 'cd python_bridge' NeuroX/*.bat (should return nothing)
Run: grep -r 'cd neurox' NeuroX/*.bat (should find matches)
Run: grep 'python_bridge_signal.csv' NeuroX/neurox/config/settings.py (should still exist - CSV not renamed)
Run: grep 'NeuroX/neurox/' NeuroX/neurox_run.bat (should find GitHub URLs)
Run: grep 'NeuroX/neurox_v3/' NeuroX/neurox_run_v3.bat (should find GitHub URLs)
Run: grep 'python_bridge/' NeuroX/neurox_run.bat (should return nothing - all folder references rebranded)
Run: grep 'from python_bridge' NeuroX/neurox/training/auto_retrain.py (should return nothing)
Run: grep 'from neurox' NeuroX/neurox/training/auto_retrain.py (should find the import)
findings: All verification checks passed. 224 files committed. No test command needed - this is a file copy/rename operation with no runtime dependencies. All CSV protocol filenames preserved intact. EA header comments updated. Python imports and paths rebranded. Bat files fully rebranded with new GitHub URLs and local paths.
